channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-12723] mdt_xattr.c:131:mdt_getxattr_one()) getxattr failed: -2
item.description:
I'm seeing this error frequently in the /var/log/messages on our MDS. Is this something that needs to be remediated?

[root@hou-mds-02 ~]# grep LustreError /var/log/messages |grep 27038
Sep 2 22:17:59 hou-mds-02.seitel.pri kernel: LustreError: 27038:0:(mdt_xattr.c:131:mdt_getxattr_one()) getxattr failed: -2
Sep 2 22:17:59 hou-mds-02.seitel.pri kernel: LustreError: 27038:0:(mdt_xattr.c:131:mdt_getxattr_one()) Skipped 613 previous similar messages
Sep 3 04:20:40 hou-mds-02.seitel.pri kernel: LustreError: 27038:0:(mdt_xattr.c:131:mdt_getxattr_one()) getxattr failed: -2
Sep 3 04:20:40 hou-mds-02.seitel.pri kernel: LustreError: 27038:0:(mdt_xattr.c:131:mdt_getxattr_one()) Skipped 691 previous similar messages
Sep 3 04:20:59 hou-mds-02.seitel.pri kernel: LustreError: 27038:0:(mdt_xattr.c:131:mdt_getxattr_one()) getxattr failed: -2
Sep 3 04:20:59 hou-mds-02.seitel.pri kernel: LustreError: 27038:0:(mdt_xattr.c:131:mdt_getxattr_one()) Skipped 911 previous similar messages
Sep 3 04:27:52 hou-mds-02.seitel.pri kernel: LustreError: 27038:0:(mdt_xattr.c:131:mdt_getxattr_one()) getxattr failed: -2
Sep 3 04:27:52 hou-mds-02.seitel.pri kernel: LustreError: 27038:0:(mdt_xattr.c:131:mdt_getxattr_one()) Skipped 9820 previous similar messages
Sep 3 04:57:08 hou-mds-02.seitel.pri kernel: LustreError: 27038:0:(mdt_xattr.c:131:mdt_getxattr_one()) getxattr failed: -2
Sep 3 04:57:08 hou-mds-02.seitel.pri kernel: LustreError: 27038:0:(mdt_xattr.c:131:mdt_getxattr_one()) Skipped 1013 previous similar messages
Sep 3 05:20:35 hou-mds-02.seitel.pri kernel: LustreError: 27038:0:(mdt_xattr.c:131:mdt_getxattr_one()) getxattr failed: -2
Sep 3 05:20:35 hou-mds-02.seitel.pri kernel: LustreError: 27038:0:(mdt_xattr.c:131:mdt_getxattr_one()) Skipped 2572 previous similar messages

 

[root@hou-mds-02 ~]# ps aux |grep 27038 |grep -v grep
root 27038 0.0 0.0 0 0 ? S Aug30 0:02 [mdt00_012]

 

[root@hou-mds-02 ~]# rpm -qa |grep lustre
lustre-modules-2.5.37.7-2.6.32_504.30.3.el6_lustre.x86_64.x86_64
lustre-2.5.37.7-2.6.32_504.30.3.el6_lustre.x86_64.x86_64
lustre-osd-ldiskfs-mount-2.5.37.7-2.6.32_504.30.3.el6_lustre.x86_64.x86_64
kernel-2.6.32-504.30.3.el6_lustre.x86_64
lustre-osd-ldiskfs-2.5.37.7-2.6.32_504.30.3.el6_lustre.x86_64.x86_64

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: How would I delete this issue / ticket?
Thanks for the quick response; I'll post it to the email list.

John

Without getting into the specifics of your situation, you are unlikely to get much response relating to such an old release. I suggest either using your support channels or else posting on lustre-discuss where there is more likely someone to share their experience. The LU project in JIRA is more focused on tracking work for more current releases

Peter
